query:
INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productName, quantity, unitPrice, addonsTotal, lineTotal, status) VALUES
((SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00029'), (SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Vinegar-Spiced Noodle Soup'), 'Vinegar-Spiced Noodle Soup', 1, 43500, 0, 43500, 'active'),
((SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00029'), (SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Biang Biang Noodles'), 'Biang Biang Noodles', 1, 41500, 0, 41500, 'active'),
((SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00029'), (SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Spicy Margherita with Basil Pillow Brioche'), 'Spicy Margherita with Basil Pillow Brioche', 1, 43500, 0, 43500, 'active'),
((SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00029'), (SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Classic Taiwan Milk Tea'), 'Classic Taiwan Milk Tea', 1, 38500, 0, 38500, 'active'),
((SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = '00029'), (SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Omurice'), 'Omurice', 1, 43500, 0, 43500, 'active');
